mnemonics: CREATE USER IS LIKE BUILDING A HOUSE, START WITH FOUNDATION (CREATE USER) AND ADD ALL THE WALLS, ROOF AND WINDOWS (GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES)
keyPoints: CREATE USER: Creates a new user account.
GRANT ALL PRIVILEGES: Gives the new user full access to the database, including creating, modifying, and deleting objects.
USE: Specifies the database to be used by the new user, if different from the default database.
